media.desc: From raw material sourcing to final inspection, every step of our manufacturing process is ISO-certified. Watch our factory tour to see how we produce industry-leading adhesives.

factory.label: Our Factory
factory.title: State-of-the-Art Manufacturing
factory.desc: Our 80,000 m² production base houses 8 automated production lines with an annual capacity of 50,000 tons. From silicone synthesis to finished product packaging, every step is precisely controlled and monitored.
features: Real-time quality monitoring at every production stage

quality.label: Quality Control
quality.title: Every Batch, Rigorously Tested
quality.desc: Our CNAS-accredited lab conducts 12 mandatory tests on every production batch — from tensile strength and elongation to UV aging and chemical resistance. Nothing ships without passing.
features: 12 mandatory quality tests per production batch
Full traceability from raw material to finished product

about.label: About Us
about.title: About Shenghan Industrial
about.desc: Since 2002 — dedicated to the R&D, manufacturing, and distribution of high-performance building sealants.
about.storyP1: Founded in 2002, Shenghan Industrial is a high-tech enterprise integrating R&D, manufacturing, and sales of building sealants. Headquartered in Guangzhou, we operate an 80,000 m² modern production facility.
about.storyP2: Our CNAS-accredited laboratory houses world-class testing equipment and R&D instrumentation, supported by 20+ national patents. Our core product line includes silicone structural sealants, weatherproof sealants, stone adhesives, and insulating glass sealants.
about.storyP3: For over two decades, Shenghan Industrial has been driven by technological innovation and defined by product quality — delivering reliable bonding and sealing solutions to 3,200+ projects worldwide.
about.journeyDesc: Over two decades of relentless progress — every step has been purposeful and resolute.

timeline.title: Company Founded
timeline.desc: Shenghan Industrial was established in Guangzhou, starting as a building sealant trading business.

timeline.title: Production Launch
timeline.desc: Commissioned our first silicone sealant production line, transitioning from trading to manufacturing.

timeline.title: Technology Breakthrough
timeline.desc: Developed the SG-9000 structural sealant for super high-rise curtain walls, a first-of-its-kind innovation.

timeline.title: National Expansion
timeline.desc: Built a nationwide sales network serving over 300 enterprise clients across China.

timeline.title: Capacity Scale-Up
timeline.desc: Opened a new production facility, increasing annual capacity to 50,000 tons.

timeline.title: Going Global
timeline.desc: Expanded exports to Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Africa — beginning our global journey.

values.title: Mission
values.desc: To protect the safety and quality of every building with reliable bonding technology.

values.title: Vision
values.desc: To become a global benchmark enterprise in the building sealant industry.

values.title: Core Values
values.desc: Integrity first, quality foremost, innovation-driven, win-win collaboration.

values.title: Core Competency
values.desc: 25 years of technical expertise, proprietary formulation R&D, and end-to-end quality control.
